zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas John Beresford' Lord of Bentley於1420年1月20日出生在英國英格蘭德比夏爾分尼 本特利時，他的父親Sir John Beresforde41歲，母親Lady Elizabeth Cecilia Basset25歲。他於1441年與Lady Agnes Hassall在英國德比夏爾德比結婚。他們至少是15個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1473年3月23日在英國德比夏爾分尼 本特利享年53歲，埋葬在德國尼德薩辛藍德可萊斯 阿莫藍德艾代維特英格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas John Beresford' Lord of Bentley于1420年1月20日出生在英国英格兰德比夏爾分尼 本特利时，他的父亲Sir John Beresforde41岁，母亲Lady Elizabeth Cecilia Basset25岁。他于1441年与Lady Agnes Hassall在英国德比夏爾德比结婚。他们至少是15个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1473年3月23日在英国德比夏爾分尼 本特利享年53岁，埋葬在德国尼德薩辛藍德可萊斯 阿莫藍德艾代維特英格蘭。

nameMeanings.name: Beresford'
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in the parish of Alstonfield, Staffordshire named Beresford, from Old English beofor ‘beaver’ (or possibly from a byname from this word) + Old English ford ‘ford’. This name also became established in Ireland.

History: The first recorded bearer of the surname is John de Beveresford, who held the manor of Beresford, Staffordshire, from c. 1220 to 1241. All present-day Beresfords are apparently descended from Thomas Beresford, who fought at Agincourt in 1415 and who fathered sixteen sons and five daughters. The Irish branch of the family includes the Marquesses of Waterford.

variants.name: Berisford
meanings: English: variant of   Beresford  .

nameMeanings.name: Lord
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English laford, louerd, lord ‘lord, master’ (Old English hlāford), perhaps given to a someone who played the part of the lord or master of ceremonies in festival games.
Irish: adoption of the English name (see 1 above) as a translation of the main element of Gaelic Ó Tighearnaigh (see Tierney ) and Mac Thighearnáin (see McKiernan ).
Americanized form of French Laure, a variant of the personal name Laur 3.

variants.name: Tierney
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Eamon, John Patrick, Brigid, Clodagh, Kieran, Michael Sean, Siobhan.

Irish: shortened form of O'Tierney, an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Tíghearnaigh ‘descendant of Tighearnach’, a byname meaning ‘lord, master’. The Gaelic name is sometimes ‘translated’ as English Lord . Compare Tiernan .

variants.name: Lords
meanings: English: variant of Lord , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sung, Jung, Yong, Chang, Kwang, Sang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jin, Kyung, Jong, Chong, Chung, Byung, Jeong, Pyong, Myong, Hak, Jin Hwan, Sook, Yeong, Choon.
Korean: variant of   O  .
Japanese: variant of Ō (see O ).

variants.name: O
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

nameMeanings.name: Bentley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places, the chief of which are in Derbyshire, Essex, Hampshire, Shropshire, Staffordshire, Suffolk, Warwickshire, Worcestershire, and East and South Yorkshire. The placename is from Old English beonet ‘bent grass’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
In some cases also an Americanized form of South German Bentele or of its Swiss German or South German cognates Bandle and Bandli.

variants.name: Bently
meanings: English: variant of   Bentley   1.
Variant of   Bentley   2, a surname of South German or Swiss German origin.

variants.name: Bentele
meanings: South German: from a short form of the personal name Pantaleon (see Pantaleo ).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas John Beresford' Lord of Bentley was born on 20 January 1420, in Fenny Bentley, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John Beresforde, was 41 and his mother, Lady Elizabeth Cecilia Basset, was 25. He married Lady Agnes Hassall in 1441, in Derby, Derbyshire, England. They were the parents of at least 15 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 23 March 1473, in Fenny Bentley, Derbyshire, England, at the age of 53, and was buried in England, Edewecht, Ammerland, Lower Saxony, Germany.

fr.St. Edmund King and Martyr Churchyard, F: England, Edewecht, Landkreis Ammerland, Niedersachsen, Allemagne
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas John Beresford' Lord of Bentley est né le 20 janvier 1420, à Fenny Bentley, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Beresforde, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth Cecilia Basset, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Lady Agnes Hassall en 1441, à Derby, Derbyshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 15 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 23 mars 1473, à Fenny Bentley, Derbyshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterré à England, Edewecht, Landkreis Ammerland, Niedersachsen, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas John Beresford' Lord of Bentley am 20. Januar 1420 in Fenny Bentley, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Beresforde 41 und seine Mutter Lady Elizabeth Cecilia Basset 25. Er hat 1441 in Derby, Derbyshire, England Lady Agnes Hassall geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 15 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 23. März 1473 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Fenny Bentley, Derbyshire, England und wurde in England, Edewecht, Landkreis Ammerland, Niedersachsen, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas John Beresford' Lord of Bentley è nato il il 20 gennaio 1420 nel Fenny Bentley, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir John Beresforde, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Lady Elizabeth Cecilia Basset, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Lady Agnes Hassall nel 1441, nel Derby, Derbyshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 15 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 23 marzo 1473, nel Fenny Bentley, Derbyshire, England, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolto a England, Edewecht, Landkreis Ammerland, Niedersachsen, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas John Beresford' Lord of Bentleyが1420年1月20日にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアフエニー ベントリーで生まれた時，父Sir John Beresfordeは41歳，母Lady Elizabeth Cecilia Bassetは25歳であった。1441年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアデルビーでLady Agnes Hassallと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも15人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1473年3月23日にイギリスデルブイシュアイアフエニー ベントリーで53歳で死去し，ドイツニーダーサチセンランドクレイス アンメルランドイーデウエチトエングランドにて埋葬された。

ko.St. Edmund King and Martyr Churchyard, F: 독일 니더작센 랜드크레이스 아머랜드 에데wch트 잉글랜드
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas John Beresford' Lord of Bentley(이)가 1420년 1월 20일 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 펜이 벤틀리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Beresforde(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth Cecilia Basset(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1441년 영국 더비실르 더비에서 Lady Agnes Hassall(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1473년 3월 23일 영국 더비실르 펜이 벤틀리에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 니더작센 랜드크레이스 아머랜드 에데wch트 잉글랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas John Beresford' Lord of Bentley nasceu em 20 de janeiro de 1420, em Fenny Bentley, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Beresforde, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Lady Elizabeth Cecilia Basset, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Agnes Hassall em 1441, em Derby, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 15 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 23 de março de 1473, em Fenny Bentley, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, com 53 anos, e foi sepultado em England, Edewecht, Landkreis Ammerland, Niedersachsen, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas John Beresford' Lord of Bentley родился 20 января 1420 г. в местности фенни бентли, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John Beresforde было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth Cecilia Basset, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Agnes Hassall в 1441 г. в местности дирби, дирбишир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 15 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер 23 марта 1473 г. в местности фенни бентли, дирбишир, Англия в возрасте 53 лет и был похоронен в местности энгланд, эдюечт, ландкрис аммирланд, ниедирсачсен, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas John Beresford' Lord of Bentley nació el 20 de enero de 1420, en Fenny Bentley, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John Beresforde, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Lady Elizabeth Cecilia Basset, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Lady Agnes Hassall en 1441, en Derby, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 15 hijos y 5 hijas.
